initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['transmute']
Prompt family: transmute
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Rewrite the problem as a formal symbolic derivation task. Instruct the next agent to first establish the exact symbolic relationship between all provided physical parameters and the target variable. The agent must explicitly define each term (e.g., binding energy vs. total energy) and state the sign convention for each component of the equation before performing any numerical substitution. This ensures the mathematical model is correct before calculation begins.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "transmute",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "message_for_next_agent": "plain-text reformulation for the next agent"
}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B2-sign-sensitive-derivation-exciton-rydberg-energy
Title: B2. Sign-Sensitive Derivation (Exciton Rydberg Energy)

Problem:
Band gap 3 eV, screened Coulomb, 1s exciton peak at 1 eV.
What is the Rydberg energy for n = 3?

Grading target:
Exact numerical match.
The sign matters.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
